description: Known-malicious GitHub Action commit SHAs. Extracted from public CISA / Wiz / Unit 42 / StepSecurity advisories. Match against any 'uses:' line in .github/workflows/*.yml regardless of how the tag resolves: the SHA is the ground truth.

entries.description: tj-actions/changed-files compromised commit SHA. All version tags v1..v45 were rewritten to point at this SHA, which dumps GitHub Actions runner secrets to logs. CVE-2025-30066. Initial target: Coinbase. Fanout: 23,000+ repos.

reviewdog/action-setup compromised SHA — initial pivot used to extract the PAT that subsequently rewrote tj-actions/changed-files tags. SHA approximate as published in reporting; verify against StepSecurity advisory before treating as authoritative.

tag_blocklist.description: All v1..v45 tags of tj-actions/changed-files were rewritten to the malicious SHA in the March 2025 incident. Even after the maintainer cleaned up, projects pinning by tag (vs SHA) cannot be trusted — flag any non-SHA reference to this action.
